text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm Mejiro Dober. Nice to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I want to be a strong racer—a racer strong
enough to run with total confidence at all times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I want to be a strong racer—a racer strong
enough to run with total confidence at all times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...That's about it. So... let's both do our best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I need you to push me really hard, Trainer, okay?
I'll do my best, too... so I can keep up during
lessons.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
